reviews.comment:
Buena comida, lugar prolijo pero  accesible solo mano a caba, en sentido contrario quedo bastante a contramano

(Translated by Google)
Good food, clean place but only accessible one way towards Buenos Aires; going in the opposite direction it's quite out of the way

It's a fairly new station with a bar. The only downside is that the bathroom at the back smells bad 🤷‍♀️

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los playeros

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach attendants
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtOVpDWjJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente estácion de servicio, muy limpia, tiene aire acondicionado y prepara comida, se puede pagar con débito, afuera  de la estación hay sauces que dan buena sombra y bancos en los que se puede comer y hay una canilla, me encantó 😃, venía de san Luis en moto y me agarró el mediodía así que pare ahí, almorcé me lave las manos y descanse un hora y seguí.. la recomiendo!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station, very clean, has air conditioning and prepares food, you can pay with debit card, outside the station there are willow trees that provide good shade and benches where you can eat and there's a water tap, I loved it 😃, I was coming from San Luis on my motorcycle and it was midday so I stopped there, had lunch, washed my hands and rested for an hour and continued on... I recommend it!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtLVlDYVF3EAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service on the beach, very fast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdE02NkR3EAE

reviews.comment:
De paso por el lugar, me cargaron combustible, limpiaron los vidrios, revisaron el agua, después de todo eso, no querían aceptar una atención, me dice el playero estamos para servirle al señor y en nuestro trabajo y deber!! No lo podía creer, gracias muchachos!!

(Translated by Google)
While passing by, they filled up my gas tank, cleaned my windows, and checked the water. After all that, they still didn't want to accept any attention. The beach attendant told me, "We're here to serve the Lord, in our work and duty!" I couldn't believe it. Thanks, guys!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtbU1mQWl3RRAB
